common.dragDropFile: Drag and drop a file here, or click to browse

home.title: FinePocket Toolbox
home.subtitle: Free Online Developer, Text & Finance Tools
home.heroDescription: Free online tools for developers and everyone. All tools run entirely in your browser.
home.heroStats: {count} powerful tools that run entirely in your browser. No data is sent to any server. No sign-up required.
home.privacyDescription: All tools process data entirely in your browser. Nothing is uploaded to any server. Your data stays on your device.

footer.browserOnly: All tools run entirely in your browser. No data is sent to any server.

json-formatter.name: JSON Formatter / Validator
json-formatter.shortDescription: Format, validate, and beautify JSON data instantly

base64.name: Base64 Encoder / Decoder
base64.shortDescription: Encode and decode Base64 strings, files, and images

jwt-decoder.name: JWT Decoder
jwt-decoder.shortDescription: Decode and inspect JSON Web Tokens instantly

url-encoder.name: URL Encoder / Decoder
url-encoder.shortDescription: Encode and decode URLs with percent-encoding

regex-tester.name: Regex Tester
regex-tester.shortDescription: Test regular expressions with real-time matching

hash-generator.name: Hash Generator
hash-generator.shortDescription: Generate MD5, SHA-1, SHA-256, and other hashes

diff-checker.name: Text Diff Checker
diff-checker.shortDescription: Compare two texts and find differences

color-picker.name: Color Picker / Converter
color-picker.shortDescription: Pick colors and convert between HEX, RGB, HSL formats

word-counter.name: Word / Character Counter
word-counter.shortDescription: Count words, characters, sentences, and reading time

case-converter.name: Case Converter
case-converter.shortDescription: Convert text to UPPER, lower, Title, camelCase, and more

lorem-ipsum.name: Lorem Ipsum Generator
lorem-ipsum.shortDescription: Generate placeholder text for your designs

markdown-preview.name: Markdown Previewer
markdown-preview.shortDescription: Write Markdown and preview rendered HTML in real-time

percentage-calculator.name: Percentage Calculator
percentage-calculator.shortDescription: Calculate percentages, discounts, and percentage changes instantly

tip-calculator.name: Tip Calculator
tip-calculator.shortDescription: Calculate tips and split bills among friends easily

age-calculator.name: Age Calculator
age-calculator.shortDescription: Calculate your exact age in years, months, days, and more

data-converter.name: Data Storage Converter
data-converter.shortDescription: Convert between bytes, KB, MB, GB, TB and other data units

unit-converter.name: Unit Converter
unit-converter.shortDescription: Convert length, weight, temperature, volume, and more

bmi-calculator.name: BMI Calculator
bmi-calculator.shortDescription: Calculate your Body Mass Index and check your weight status

loan-calculator.name: Loan Calculator
loan-calculator.shortDescription: Calculate monthly payments, total interest, and amortization schedule

compound-interest.name: Compound Interest Calculator
compound-interest.shortDescription: Calculate compound interest growth with regular contributions

date-calculator.name: Date Calculator
date-calculator.shortDescription: Calculate days between dates or add/subtract days from a date

currency-converter.name: Currency Converter
currency-converter.shortDescription: Convert between 30+ world currencies with live exchange rates
